summary: Explained why local GitHub Release upload kept blocking: git push uses Git Credential Manager, while scripts/publish-github-release.ps1 uses GitHub REST release APIs and only accepts GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN, or -Token; gh CLI is not installed. Resolved the immediate release by pushing tag v2.2.8, which triggered the existing GitHub Actions release-windows workflow. The workflow completed successfully and uploaded DinoBrainSetup.zip plus DinoBrainSetup.zip.sha256 to the v2.2.8 release.
decisions: Used the existing tag-triggered GitHub Actions release workflow instead of requiring a local token for release upload.
Did not retrieve or expose any stored Git credential or token.
Verified the release via GitHub API after workflow success.
next_steps: For future releases, either push the version tag to trigger GitHub Actions or install/login gh CLI and update the script to use gh auth token as a fallback.
Use https://github.com/clockmansy/dinobrain/releases/tag/v2.2.8 as the current installer release link.
